title: Enable access requests across your Unity Catalog metastore (Public Preview) ​
body:
**June 22, 2026**

You can now enable access requests at the Unity Catalog metastore level. This feature also lets you set a metastore-level destination that's inherited by all catalogs, schemas, and other objects without their own destination. By enabling metastore-level access requests, users can request access to objects even when no destination is explicitly configured. See [Manage access requests](/aws/en/data-governance/unity-catalog/manage-privileges/access-request-destinations).
